meta.description: Example config for Tools/WaspServerInstaller. Secrets are never stored here — pass at Apply time. difficulty is always Veteran (immutable).

headlessClients.why: HC count default 2 matches live WASP primary topology (server-config README + Hetzner profiles hc-2). More HCs need extra interactive Steam sessions; wiki: ~1 server + 1/HC + 1 OS headroom cores.

modes.on: Full WASPSCALE/gameplay RPT telemetry + player-stats pipeline
modes.stats-only: Gameplay/WASPSCALE-family flags off; player-stats + PLAYERSTAT remain on for leaderboard feed

telemetry.why: Maps to WFBE_C_STATLOG / WFBE_C_STATS_ENABLED / WFBE_C_PLAYERSTAT_ENABLED / WFBE_C_MATCH_TELEMETRY / WFBE_C_TELEM_HOST_V2 per flag-catalog.json

perf.serverMallocWhy: Measured WASP dedicated default; server-config/README.md allocator split (server mimalloc / HC tbb4malloc_bi). mimalloc works on A2OA 1.64 per fleet custom-allocator finding.
perf.serverCpuCountWhy: WASP HC launch lines and hosting corpus use cpuCount=2 for isolation; main loop is effectively single-thread-bound — cpuCount is engine-belief override, not free multi-core sim (GROK-SERVER-HOSTING-CORPUS + BI era wiki).
perf.serverExThreadsWhy: UNVERIFIED optimal for dedicated under modern P/E-core hosts. Conservative choice matches live HC lines (exThreads=3). Auto is 3 dual / 7 quad+; picking 7 unmeasured on main — stay conservative.
perf.serverPriorityWhy: Hosting corpus / box tuning notes: keep dedicated sim at High; HCs AboveNormal so server wins contention (OS-side; not an engine guarantee).
perf.hcPriorityWhy: See serverPriorityWhy; Set-WaspCpuAffinity + post-boot tuning pattern.
perf.maxMemWhy: 32-bit process hard ceiling ~2047 MB (BI/wiki; local HC lines).

affinity.why: Disjoint server vs HC masks; never share server cores with HCs. Set-WaspCpuAffinity.ps1 + wiki Operator-Monitor-And-CPU-Affinity-Tools-Reference. Masks are hardware-specific — recompute on the target box.

basicCfg.why: Live server-config/basic.cfg JIP-stall fix: MaxSizeGuaranteed=512 (1024 caused permanent black 'Receiving mission'). MaxMsgSend/MaxSize*=512 co-tuned. Installer VERSIONS basic.cfg (basic.cfg.v1) to avoid unversioned overwrite risk.

slotScaling.note: Default keeps proven 512 values; enable only if uplink evidence says raise. Do not invent bandwidth numbers.

asrAi.why: ASR AI via @adwasp is the one real modpack FPS/AI-behavior lever on HC locality (server-config README: do not drop @adwasp from HC mod line). Exact hpp knobs vary by ASR build — installer writes a minimal documented skeleton; owner merges with live userconfig.

reconcile.deployWasp: After config apply, use Tools/Ops/Deploy-Wasp.ps1 to pack+place mission PBOs and repoint template (separate -Apply). This installer does NOT deploy to live slots.
reconcile.hetznerInstaller: For fenced transactional copy of PBO+canonical configs into a new host tree, hand rendered outputs to PR #1102 Tools/HetznerInstaller (MIKSUUS-TEST fence only until owner opens runtime gate).
reconcile.setWaspCpuAffinity: Generated launch scripts embed affinity masks; optional post-boot: Tools/Ops/Set-WaspCpuAffinity.ps1 -ServerMask <hex> -HcMasks <hex,...> -Apply
